Investigate shuri bridge error spike: read log at /tmp/gemini-agent2-bridge.log, find root cause, fix it. (6 errors in 10min, samples: 2026-03-22 15:19:42,908 [ERROR] getUpdates: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='api.telegr | 2026-03-22 15:19:46,899 [ERROR] getUpdates: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='api.telegr)
Fix OAuth token failure for agents: 'captain', 'shuri', 'beast', 'vision'
Fix OAuth token failure for agents: 'vision'
Fix OAuth token failure for agents: 'captain'

Build smart log parser: Read the last 100 lines of each agent log file (/tmp/gemini-bridge.log, /tmp/gemini-agent2-bridge.log, /tmp/gemini-agent3-bridge.log, /tmp/gemini-agent4-bridge.log, /tmp/ironman-bridge.log) and extract: (1) current task name, (2) last score, (3) iterations count. Output clean JSON to /tmp/agent_activity.json. Run it now and print the output.

Research and build a Python script that queries ~/.avengers/missions.db and produces a JSON analytics report: missions per agent, avg score per agent, score trend over last 7 days (by day), top 3 best missions. Save to /tmp/avengers_analytics.json and print it.

You are a UX designer reviewing a real-time agent dashboard. The dashboard has: agent status cards, live activity log feed, direct chat to agents, mission board. Research best practices for real-time operations dashboards. Write a detailed improvement spec covering: (1) what visual indicators would best show agent cognitive load, (2) how to show task progress %, (3) what keyboard shortcuts to add, (4) how to visualize score trends inline. Save to /tmp/dashboard_ux_spec.md
Fix OAuth token failure for agents: 'vision'
Fix OAuth token failure for agents: 'shuri', 'beast'
Fix OAuth token failure for agents: 'shuri', 'beast'
